name: Yakuza Undisputed
short_description: Story follows a yakuza member who was framed, spent a couple of years in jail. After being released, he learns that the T.Kimaru gang had taken his belovd"xioyu" captive for been accused of losing the syndicate boss money, can you rescue her from the opposing gang maybe, maybe not. Kimaru awaits you
detailed_description:
An immersive dive in to an action packed gameplay storyline of the Yakuzas
This is a game set off in the east side of Tokyo, following an intense combat gameplay style and a 3D storytelling cinematic cutscene about a yakuza member named Goku whose Beloved"Xioyu" was taken as a collateral for losing the syndicate boss money in a setup that took him to jail, unaware of what has happened, after his release he set's off to find his missing lover and seek the truth.

Features
This game offers a rich beat em up style gameplay where you play as a Goku following a 3D cinematic storytelling sequence.
Well designed and skilled Bosses
Play through more than 15+ levels and Boss fights
Gorgeous levels
Good Graphics

Gameplay
While you start off as Goku, shortly after a cutscene that introduces you to the story behind this game, you will be constantly involved in Frequently intense combat, fighting through Mobs,Bandits and Gangstas all working for the Tojo clan, carefully studying and mastering the type of weapons and time to pick them up and use them in other to complete each levels, each levels comes with a 3D cinematic cutscenes that gets you furtherly immersed in to this game... As you play on you will find out if you seek the Truth, your Beloved or Revenge.
